meta_lead_forms.note: Meta Ads MCP is present in this session's deferred tools, but no Lead Ads forms have been created on the Blue Everest Asset Group page. If FB/IG Lead Ads are planned, forms and CRM webhook must be defined before launch. Did not query Meta Ads in this run because phase guard is active and no read was requested.

google_ads_lead_form.note: Google Ads has 0 campaigns and no Lead Form extension or asset. Advertiser verification still pending on customer 4031838704.

expected_lead_schema.source: Google Sheets (lead form responses) and WATI inbound

field_definitions.submitted_at: ISO 8601 timestamp (Asia/Manila preferred, must include timezone)
field_definitions.name: Full name, free text
field_definitions.email: Valid email; deduplication key together with phone
field_definitions.phone: E.164 with country code (e.g., +972...), required for WhatsApp follow-up
field_definitions.country: ISO country code or full name; expected values include IL and PH
field_definitions.investment_amount: Numeric. IL: ILS. PH: PHP. Currency inferred from country/language
field_definitions.utm_source: facebook | google | instagram | direct | organic | whatsapp
field_definitions.utm_campaign: IL-1, IL-2, PH-1, etc. matching active campaign codes

expected_lead_schema.hot_lead_action: Send WATI alert to sales agent and mark priority='HOT' in lead_updates.json. Never contact the lead directly.

state_files.rationale_for_no_write: Preparation mode. No live polling performed, so the watermark must not advance. The state file structure is correct and ready for the first LIVE run.

queue_status.note: alert_no_tasks.md remains the carried-forward signal. Claude Code (planning) must generate _queue/{date}/tasks_lead.json before flipping simulation=false.

suggested_actions: Grant Google Drive read consent in a future session so this agent can verify whether a lead-form sheet already exists before a new one is provisioned.
Install the remaining Cowork connectors required for live lead intake: WATI, HubSpot, Brevo, and either a Google Sheets-native MCP or accept that lead-form polling will go via the Drive MCP.
Resolve the IL pricing mismatch first. Recommend CLAUDE.md as the source of truth (1,535,000 ILS / 1,650,000 ILS / 9,999 ILS) and align campaign_state.json before any IL ad or lead form goes live.

Create the Google Sheet 'Panglao Prime Villas - Lead Form Responses' with the columns listed in expected_lead_schema. Share with the Cowork Drive connector. Record sheetId and tab name in campaign_state.json under a new platforms.lead_sources.google_sheets node and in _status/lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet.
Stand up the website lead form on primevilla.ph that writes to that sheet, with UTM passthrough and language field.
Create the WATI account, capture Client ID, define inbound intake template, and add sales_agent {name, whatsapp, email, hours_pht, escalation_sla_minutes} to campaign_state.json.
Create the HubSpot portal (or alternative CRM) with one pipeline: New -> Qualified -> Meeting Scheduled -> Reservation Paid -> Contract -> Closed.
Create the Brevo account and a 'Leads' contact list with custom attributes matching expected_lead_schema.
Create at least one Meta Lead Ads form and one Google Ads Lead Form asset.
Install Meta Pixel and Google Tag on primevilla.ph (snippet at _status/tracking_codes_install.html).
Reconcile scheduled-tasks cron with documented PHT slots, or update agent prompts to match the actual fire times.
Once all of the above are green: set start_date + go_live_date, flip simulation=false, and let LEAD_CHECK begin real polling.
live_lead_collection_skip_reason: Phase is PRE_LAUNCH and simulation=true. No live lead intake configured. WATI/HubSpot/Brevo accounts not created, no lead sheet provisioned, Google Drive consent denied this run.
hebrew_summary: מצב קליטת לידים ב 31-05-2026, 13:00 שעון מנילה: עדיין מצב הכנה, ה phase guard פעיל. שינוי יחיד מאתמול: ה connector של Google Drive מופיע השבוע ברשימת הכלים הזמינים לסשן, אך ההרשאה לקרוא לו נדחתה בריצה הזו ולכן לא בוצעה שאילתה. WATI, HubSpot, Brevo וכלי ייעודי ל Google Sheets עדיין חסרים. גיליון לידים טרם נוצר, אין סוכן מכירות מוגדר, ה Pixel וה Google Tag עדיין לא מותקנים ב primevilla.ph, ו Google Ads מחכה לאימות מפרסם. חוסר ההתאמה במחירי השקל בין CLAUDE.md (1,535,000 ש"ח / 1,650,000 ש"ח) לבין campaign_state.json (1,450,000 ש"ח / 1,550,000 ש"ח) פתוח כבר מעל 96 שעות. ה cron ממשיך לפעול ב 08:02 שעון מנילה במקום ב 13:00 כפי שמתועד. כל החסמים שזוהו ב 30-05 עדיין פתוחים, לא נוסף ולא נסגר. עד שהחסמים נסגרים: אין לידים לסקור, אין יעד CRM, אין ערוץ התראה. ההמלצה: לאשר Drive בריצה הבאה, להתקין connectors חסרים, להקים גיליון לידים, להגדיר סוכן מכירות, ולסגור את מחירי השקל למקור אמת אחד לפני שמורידים את simulation.
